feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)

entry.title: Let me
entry.summary:
Author: lnobodyll

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,986Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 71

Summary: Prince Bruce sneaks out at night to patrol Gotham. At a quiet bar, he meets Clark, a shy, earnest farmer?—and one impulsive, heated moment in a hidden room leaves them both stunned, tangled in desire and things they didn’t expect.

entry.title: Forever in debt to priceless advice
entry.summary:
Author: capricious_Bastard

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,069Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: There's a hush that befalls the city. Time has stopped for a moment as the big screens at Gotham Square flicker. Like a corrupted tape that's been stitched and Frankenstein-ed together. And they all watch as their heart falls.

entry.title: Bruce and Clark
entry.summary:
Author: TS_Rhodes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,947Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 61

Summary: When ten-year-old Bruce Wayne's ride breaks down near the Kent farm, he meets ten-year-old Clark, and a friendship forms. The Kents are concerned about Bruce, since he is recently orphaned. Clark, whose powers are just starting to come in, pleads to keep Bruce as a friend. So they invite Bruce and his guardian Alfred to come back and stay the summer. And so it begins...

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Childhood Friends

entry.title: I Used To Obsess Over Living, Now I Only Obsess Over You
entry.summary:
Author: l0s3rzclub

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,096Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 77

Summary: Clark, of course, knew that Bruce Wayne had been studying at Metropolis University. The billionaire was all anyone could talk about when he first got accepted. Except for Clark. He'd actually counted himself lucky to never run into the guy. From the sounds of it, Bruce was just another rich kid with a superiority complex. ______ OR: Enemies to Lovers College AU because it's so fucking good.

entry.title: It’s brutal out here!
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,011Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 287

Summary: When Bruce’s silence gestured for him to go on, Clark chuckled slightly, fiddling with the sleeve of his shirt. “You know what I mean. Everyone had a grungy era of their childhood. Mine was just a little more . . . intense than others. entry.title: starstruck
entry.summary:
Author: craycr4y

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,984Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 903

Summary: A loud bang shuts down Hal’s train of thoughts, his head swivels towards its direction, wondering if Batman had finally deigned to show up. But it wasn’t him. Instead, the person who shows up is decked out in red and blue; black lines stretch across his suit and meet at his chest to form a symbol of a… spider? Huh. Did Batman change themes? or Spider-Man & Batman are best friends. No, the Justice League doesn't know that. And if you ask Bruce, they never should.Until they do.

entry.title: I have emotional motion sickness
entry.summary:
Author: filmdarling1304

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,962Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 153

Summary: Why is Clark out to get him? Hasn’t he been a good boyfriend? Hasn’t he? Maybe he hasn’t, maybe he’s so sick in the brain that even Clark can sense it. Maybe by fattening him up, he would get back at Bruce for clearly ruining his life. Maybe- “Bruce? Breakfast is ready.” Clark’s grating voice was outside the bathroom door.   Unknown to anybody, Bruce had been struggling with food for nearly two decades.Unknown to anybody, Bruce stopped taking his medication.What follows is a man who couldn't stop himself from falling into a hole of intense disordered eating, paranoia, and unhealthy coping mechanisms that could cost him his life.That is, if the ones who love him don't stop him first.

entry.title: Equinox
entry.summary:
Author: Tan99

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,981Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 69

Summary: Grief changes people.Sometimes it breaks them.Sometimes—it rebuilds them into something unrecognizable.What happens when a young Tim Drake is sold by his own parents?When Tim Drake returns to Gotham City, the Bats expects a boy trying to survive loss.What they find instead is someone who already knows how.

entry.title: This was not part of the VIP package
entry.summary:
Author: ThatStupidTheAlien

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,340Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 54

Summary: Bruce Wayne just wanted to be a good dad (and never be called an old man). What he didn't expect was to spend over $100,000 on a WWE VIP experience, survive a weekend in Vegas with three overly excited kids… and end up being the landing zone for his kids' favorite wrestler. Superman, the King of the Air, is used to calculating every jump with precision—until he misses and ends up falling right on top of Bruce Wayne. Between the lights, the matches, the autograph signings (and a Jason Todd on the verge of a breakdown after meeting Rhea Ripley), Bruce begins to discover that perhaps the most unexpected thing about the whole trip wasn't the fall… but the person who landed on him, which was definitely not part of the itinerary, much less the VIP package.

entry.title: Rod of Steel
entry.summary:
Author: DiseasedBreeze

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,697Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 89

Summary: Superman is as close to retired as you can be while still being a hero. He isn't an active member of any of the teams he'd once been a part of but he still helps out here and there from time to time. When Gotham gets a new hero he decides to stop by and check them out and, after a less than friendly first meeting Superman agreeing to mentor this new hero 'Batman' turns into Bruce and Clark kissing on rooftops. This might not be either or their first times with a man but Clark is keen to stress the point that having sex with a Kryptonian carries risks having sex with a human man doesn't, namely that his cock is as invulnerable as the rest of him.

entry.title: Bothering City
entry.summary:
Author: miuwk4t

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,128Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 108

Summary: “Clark,” he tried,“Love,”Bruce got closer to Clark, observing his expressions before putting his hands under Clark’s chin, cupping his face as the two lovers made eye-contact.“We could always try again,” He said, sure it was the most basic thing people would say when someone failed but it was the least Bruce could try to comfort Clark.-Where Clark tries to propose to Bruce but Gotham hates him so much he almost ends up crying

entry.title: The Fifth Letter
entry.summary:
Author: ObsidianWings_Ink

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,593Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 8

Summary: ​In a universe where the gifted attend the prestigious Academy of Superheroes, fifteen-year-old Bruce Wayne is just a powerless orphan from the bleak streets of Gotham. He has sent five letters, pleading for a single chance. He expected another rejection; he didn't expect a confrontation with Roman Sionis to unlock something mysterious in a dark alleyway.​New romances, new friendships, and new adventures await him—along with a tragic event that lies ahead. ​(More tags will be added as the story progresses.)

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 86,159Chapters: 17/30Kudos: 520

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

entry.title: Puzzles and Platonia
entry.summary:
Author: StarwriterOdeya

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,770Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Lex Luthor received a sentient email and followed the ritual to be left alone. Clark Kent was called by Lepon naapurusto to meet the Honoured Spirit. He hadn't heard of the planet it belonged to because it had been fictional. He greeted Faith Lawson, Ascended name Odeya. Their challenges were easily conquered, including the one Faith thought would be the most troublesome. The Coarse-Born reverted to Metropolites and went their ways. Clark returned to work and sent The Flash, Barry Allen, to keep Faith company and bring lunch. Flash and Superman thought that Faith should stay, given her knowledge and abilities, and Flash helped Faith choose her hero name, Aileni. He brought her to Gotham, having seen her phone case and wallet, and they found a great option in the listings Batman provided, Atrium Residencies. Faith had powerful Forms and Modes thanks to her Role in Thalassic Space and the Ever-Light Cloth, but had physical disabilities because of her dwarfism and was mortal. She could see Hidden Object Scenes and puzzles, and had good eyesight, resilience, and charm. But she wrote fantasy-horror, had a few phobias, and randomly faced Master difficulty logic puzzles to make things "fair". Nothing could go wrong!

entry.title: New Boy, Old Ghosts (My Grave's Getting Cold)
entry.summary:
Author: god_i_love_fanfics

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,970Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 83

Summary: Memories always came in short, blurry bursts with little to no rhyme or reason.Recall something here, reminisce there. Fiery orange hair, almost-violet eyes, a vermillion beanie, noxious twin hazmat suits in blindingly bright, if not straight up gaudy, colors. Sometimes, the memories weren’t just wisps of thought that slid through Danny’s cold fingers. Sometimes, they were warm, soft, even, and quelled the perpetual shivering that always seemed to wrack his body (which is strange, because Danny has a space core. The cold shouldn’t bother him like this).

  • cannon is in fact my bitch
  • no beta we die like Jason and Danny
  • Dead Jack and Maddie Fenton
  • Dead Tucker Foley
  • Dead Sam Manson

  • tags to be added because the author is a lazy shit who just wants to write the story

entry.title: The Detective’s Greatest Blindspot
entry.summary:
Author: Tigerphoenix

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,686Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 88

Summary: While he just wants Superman to stay on his side of the bay, Bruce encounters reporter Clark Kent at a gala, who calls Bruce out on his "Brucie" act. What starts as a tense "what are you hiding?" case turns into a genuine connection, where Bruce is so convinced that Clark Kent and the alien savior of Metropolis could never be the same person, he misses Clark's biggest secret. Then disaster strikes. In a Superman fight, the Daily Planet is destroyed, and witnesses say Clark was inside. Clark is dead—Superman's negligence killed him—and it has turned the Bat into a hunter, looking for a way to make the god pay for killing the best man he had ever known.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Dick Grayson & Bruce Wayne
  • Alfred Pennyworth & Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent & Lois Lane
  • Clark Kent & Martha Kent
  • Clark Kent & Martha Kent & Bruce Wayne
  • Martha Kent & Bruce Wayne
  • Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent
  • Dick Grayson

  • Lois Lane

  • Mistaken Identity
  • Presumed Dead
  • Slow Burn

  • Friends to Enemies to Lovers

  • Angst with a Happy Ending

  • Bruce Wayne is Batman
  • Clark Kent is Superman
  • Survivor Guilt
  • Bruce Wayne is Brucie Wayne

  • Dick Grayson is Robin
